task_name: Inovus Medical LapAR Training System Overview

demonstrated_techniques: proper ergonomic positioning at training station
digital feedback integration for skill assessment
verbal_cues: Great skills shown on this procedure
Your accuracy and technique has improved
common_errors_addressed: importance of consistent practice across multiple procedures
need for objective feedback during training

confidence_rationale: Clear promotional/educational content showing Inovus Medical LapAR system features, interface screenshots, and training environment setup. Contains visible feedback messages and procedural categories but no actual FLS task performance.
cannot_determine: Actual completion times or penalty assessments
technique_summary: This is an instructional video showcasing the Inovus Medical LapAR augmented reality laparoscopic training platform. Shows various surgical procedures that can be practiced (appendectomy, cholecystectomy, bowel anastomosis, salpingostomy, myomectomy, salpingectomy, hysterectomy, pyloromyotomy) and fundamental skills (ligation, suturing, grasping, cutting). Demonstrates the digital interface providing real-time feedback and performance tracking.
